finding_results.notes: Moved the first irreversible public act into the room before the renewed consequences run: the South African runner reopens his Meridian file on-page, which changes the leverage for the remaining discussion. After that fracture, the scene turns to bodily fallout, Lena's desync calculus, her same-night commitment, and the other athletes' wait-or-sign reactions instead of re-arguing the already legible binary.

Feed severance now reads as a bodily threat, not just a policy objection: Margot tears the skin under the interface, carries the raw abrasion through the scene, visibly misses the chair when the feed loss is named, and exits shielding the injury. The revised beats keep her athlete-safety argument intact while making the craving socially legible.
Replaced the minor runner's recycled 'flat' vocal tag with 'thinned out' so her fatigue reads as her own rather than borrowing Margot's register marker.

Removed the two middle wrist-band repetition beats and replaced them with different distress signals. The chapter now keeps the initial snap to the interface and the later compulsive return, while the intervening Margot beats use abrasion, a missed reach, and guarded exit posture instead of repeating the same hand-worrying image.

finding_results.notes: Seven targeted edits across the three flagged voices plus one narrator-admiring cut. (1) Removed 'That landed and stayed there' at line 153 — narrator no longer applauds Margot's challenge. (2) Jin-seo's brother speech (lines 215-223): broken into three sub-blocks of max 3 sentences each with physical breaks between; 'Ugly isn't the same thing as untested' replaced with the plainer 'Those are different problems'; added a false start ('So I can't —') to give the closer friction rather than aphoristic compression. (3) Margot's feed-loss line (255): shortened from a balanced pair to blunt Margot syntax ('The athlete's alone in it'). (4) Margot's consequences speech (271): triple-parallel 'That's rent / That's family / That's next year' compressed to two flat declaratives ('That's a missed final. That's someone's rent.'); rhythmic fragment chain ('Sticky start. Late wall. Raw landings.') replaced with a comma-joined list. (5) Lena's list (283): 'This version of me' summary cap removed; 'language gaps' narrowed to 'gaps'; swimming-specific 'sets' replaces generic 'work'. (6) Lena's comparison (291-297): monologue split by Yusuf's nod and silence; no speaker delivers more than 3 uninterrupted sentences. (7) Lena's decision (307): 'I'll lose more time and call that thinking' replaced with the plainer 'by morning the damage is worse' — precise Lena logic without the quotable compression. Voice separation achieved: Jin-seo cracks under controlled professionalism (false start, fragmented facts), Margot cuts with flat blunt declaratives, Lena arrives through physical checking and clinical precision with swimming vocabulary.

The trust fracture, Farah reveal fallout, and Lena-decision pause now stay on gesture, posture, and bodily response instead of narrator certification.

pass_summaries.summary: Restructured the back half of the meeting so the room fractures publicly sooner, moved Lena's patch commitment into the meeting's active leverage run, and made Margot's threatened feed loss physically ugly and socially visible while removing the repeated wrist-band and 'flat' descriptor tics.

Addressed the single finding by roughening composed-pressure dialogue across Jin-seo, Margot, and Lena so that no speaker delivers more than one thesis burst exceeding three consecutive sentences and the three voices no longer share the same polished argumentative cadence. Removed one narrator-admiring line. All edits are local to the flagged exchanges; chapter structure, continuity obligations, must-land beats (patch presentation, Farah reveal, group fracture, Lena's decision), and the farah_condition payoff are preserved intact.
Revised the flagged overstatement beats in chapter 12 so the scene's meaning stays legible through observed consequence and silence rather than abstract summary.
